prompt: Generate a vibrant festival website homepage using the crowd photo from the first image and the event schedule layout from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a vibrant festival website homepage. The design should feature the dynamic concert crowd photo from image 1 as a large, immersive hero background image in the upper portion of the page, overlaid with a prominent festival title and a call-to-action button (e.g., "Get Tickets"). Below this hero section, incorporate the clean event schedule layout from image 2 as a distinct content block, preserving its visual structure, text style, and time slot formatting. The small 'Logo' graphic from the top-right of image 2 should be integrated into the website's header, alongside essential navigation links such as 'Home', 'Schedule', and 'Tickets'. The overall aesthetic should be lively and engaging, consistent with a music festival.
objects: Concert crowd photo as hero background (upper portion)
Event schedule content block (below hero, preserving visual style from image 2)
